title: B-Side of YTPMV (April Fools Video)
description:
A.k.a. GRAND-Side of DAD

...Huh, the work I did on A-Side seemed to have really motivated me more than I expected. We haven't even reached A-Side's actual anniversary date yet, but I didn't want to wait for half a year to release this either.  :/

Nevertheless, here you go people, another GRAND entry to the *-Side of YTPMV series.  :3

***

Download:
MP3: http://www.mediafire.com/download/om3aew404fiekgg
FLP: http://www.mediafire.com/download/hgopkvtsp96fqkc

B-Side Playlist (list of songs and videos):
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLGJaw4bmn0C1bM2-0aPKX-Nqa7mDmVpYq

Original medley:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nF-xdiL7Nr0

Original remake:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DrCLBuf0Yec

***

Happy April Fools' Day everyone, the actual B-Side of YTPMV will come out eventually this year.  :P
